overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through Vespucci Beach skate park and shoreline. The camera moves from a paved plaza with palm trees through concrete skate ramps, down to the sandy beach, and approaches a shipwreck near the water. The scene features clear sunny weather with the Del Perro Pier visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront plaza with sculptural building and palm trees

events.description: helicopter flies overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the skate park area

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near the grass

entered.detail: large angular brown structure with pointed roof and multiple levels
tall palm trees lining the plaza perimeter
wide paved pedestrian area with curved concrete borders

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunny beachfront plaza dominated by a distinctive angular brown building and tall palm trees. The camera walks forward through the concrete plaza where a few NPCs are standing in groups. A helicopter passes overhead in the clear sky as the scene establishes the coastal recreational area.

scene_state.functional_zone: park pathway approaching skate park stairs

events.description: approaching concrete stairs leading up to the skate park level

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved pathway toward the stairs leading to the upper skate area

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the bottom step with a bicycle leaning nearby

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal handrails leading upward
silver metal handrails along the stair edges

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the plaza building, the camera follows a curved concrete path toward a set of stairs. An NPC sits on the steps with a bicycle as the camera approaches the transition to the elevated skate park area.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete skate park with bowls and ramps overlooking beach

events.description: ascending the concrete stairs to enter the skate park
exiting the enclosed bowl area toward the open beach view

agents.ego_description: walking through the concrete skate park, navigating around ramps and bowls while approaching the beach overlook

entered.detail: large curved concrete skate bowl with smooth surfaces and metal coping
long pier structure with Ferris wheel visible in the distance across the beach
large dark shipwreck resting on the sand near the waterline

segments.scene_description: After climbing the stairs, the camera explores the elevated concrete skate park with its characteristic bowls and ramps. The view opens up to reveal the beach, the Del Perro Pier with its Ferris wheel, and a beached shipwreck in the distance as the camera moves along the park's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with shipwreck and shoreline amenities

events.description: transitioning from concrete path onto sandy beach surface

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the water, passing the shipwreck and approaching the lifeguard tower

entered.detail: expansive sandy beach with tire tracks and footprints
small wooden lifeguard station with dark roof on the sand
colorful beach umbrellas scattered along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions onto the sandy beach, leaving the concrete structures behind. The camera walks across the sand past the prominent beached shipwreck, with the Del Perro Pier visible in the hazy distance. Colorful beach umbrellas and a lifeguard tower appear as the camera approaches the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny beachfront plaza through a concrete skate park and finally onto the open sands of the shoreline. It begins in a paved plaza dominated by an angular brown building and tall palm trees, moving forward past groups of people as a helicopter passes overhead. As the camera leaves the plaza, it follows a curved concrete path toward a set of stairs where a person sits with a bicycle, transitioning upward into an elevated skate park. The scene then expands across the concrete bowls and ramps of the park, revealing a wide view of the Del Perro Pier and a distant shipwreck before descending from the structures. Finally, the camera moves onto the sandy beach, walking past the beached shipwreck and colorful umbrellas toward the water's edge with the pier visible in the hazy distance.
